title: Fix t_echo gateway SLIP/SERIAL Kconfig conflict
description: While verifying project-LICHEN-0low, west build -p always -b t_echo/nrf52840 lichen/apps/gateway -d build_gateway_0low_techo_check aborted during Kconfig. CONFIG_SLIP=y selects UART_PIPE and UART_INTERRUPT_DRIVEN, but the t_echo board config leaves SERIAL=n, so Zephyr treats the warnings as fatal before compilation. Decide whether the BLE gateway variant should disable SLIP like generic nrf52840dk, or enable SERIAL/UART support for wired SLIP.
close_reason: Fixed: T-Echo gateway board config disables Zephyr wired SLIP because this variant exposes LCI over BLE NUS. Verified requested west build passes Kconfig with CONFIG_SLIP and CONFIG_SERIAL unset; it now reaches link and stops on separate undefined symbols tracked as project-LICHEN-wnnz.
